title: Turn Resolution & Final Output
interaction_flow: RunLoop → get_single_step_result_from_response(bindings, all_tools, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, output_schema, handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, tool_use_tracker)
get_single_step_result_from_response → process_model_response(agent, all_tools, response, output_schema, handoffs, existing_items) → ProcessedResponse
get_single_step_result_from_response → tool_use_tracker.record_processed_response(agent, processed_response)
get_single_step_result_from_response → execute_tools_and_side_effects(bindings, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, processed_response, output_schema, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config)
execute_tools_and_side_effects → _build_plan_for_fresh_turn(processed_response, agent, context_wrapper, approval_items_by_call_id) → TurnPlan

execute_tools_and_side_effects → _execute_tool_plan(plan, bindings, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config) → (function_results, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, computer_results, ...)
execute_tools_and_side_effects → _collect_tool_interruptions(function_results, ...) → interruptions
[ALT: interruptions exist] execute_tools_and_side_effects → return SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepInterruption(interruptions))
[ALT: handoffs detected] execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_handoffs(...) → return SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepHandoff(new_agent))

execute_tools_and_side_effects → _maybe_finalize_from_tool_results(public_agent, original_input, new_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, function_results, hooks, context_wrapper, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results)
_maybe_finalize_from_tool_results → check_for_final_output_from_tools(agent, function_results, context_wrapper) → ToolsToFinalOutputResult
[ALT: tool_use_behavior=stop_on_first_tool OR stop_at_tool_names match] check_for_final_output_from_tools → return ToolsToFinalOutputResult(is_final_output=True, final_output=...)
[ALT: callable tool_use_behavior] check_for_final_output_from_tools → await agent.tool_use_behavior(context_wrapper, tool_results) → ToolsToFinalOutputResult

[IF is_final_output=True] _maybe_finalize_from_tool_results → execute_final_output(public_agent, original_input, new_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, final_output, hooks, context_wrapper, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results)
[ELSE: no tools to run + message output] execute_tools_and_side_effects → output_schema.validate_json(potential_final_output_text) → final_output
[ELSE: no tools to run + plain text] execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_final_output(..., final_output=potential_final_output_text or '')
[ELSE: still tools to run] execute_tools_and_side_effects → return SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepRunAgain())

execute_final_output → execute_final_output_step(public_agent, original_input, new_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, final_output, hooks, context_wrapper, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, run_final_output_hooks_fn?)
execute_final_output_step → run_final_output_hooks(agent, hooks, context_wrapper, final_output)
run_final_output_hooks → create AgentHookContext(context, usage, _approvals, turn_input)
run_final_output_hooks → asyncio.gather(hooks.on_agent_end(agent_hook_context, agent, final_output), agent.hooks.on_end(agent_hook_context, agent, final_output) if agent.hooks else noop)

execute_final_output_step → return SingleStepResult(original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step=NextStepFinalOutput(final_output), tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, output_guardrail_results=[])
RunLoop receives SingleStepResult with next_step=NextStepFinalOutput
RunLoop → _finalize_streamed_final_output(streamed_result, agent, run_config, output, context_wrapper, save_items, items, response_id, store_setting)
_finalize_streamed_final_output → _run_output_guardrails_for_stream(agent, run_config, output, context_wrapper, streamed_result) → output_guardrail_results
_finalize_streamed_final_output → streamed_result.output_guardrail_results = output_guardrail_results
_finalize_streamed_final_output → streamed_result.final_output = output
_finalize_streamed_final_output → streamed_result.is_complete = True
_finalize_streamed_final_output → save_items(items, response_id, store_setting)
_finalize_streamed_final_output → event_queue.put_nowait(QueueCompleteSentinel())

key_data_structures.SingleStepResult: dataclass with: original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step (NextStepFinalOutput|NextStepHandoff|NextStepRunAgain|NextStepInterruption), tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, output_guardrail_results, session_step_items, processed_response
key_data_structures.NextStepFinalOutput: dataclass with: output: Any — signals turn is complete with a final answer
key_data_structures.NextStepRunAgain: dataclass — empty, signals model should be called again
key_data_structures.NextStepInterruption: dataclass with: interruptions: list[ToolApprovalItem] — pauses run for approval
key_data_structures.ProcessedResponse: dataclass with: new_items, handoffs, functions, computer_actions, local_shell_calls, custom_tool_calls, shell_calls, apply_patch_calls, tools_used, mcp_approval_requests, interruptions
key_data_structures.ToolsToFinalOutputResult: dataclass with: is_final_output: bool, final_output: Any
key_data_structures.AgentHookContext: context snapshot with: context, usage, _approvals, turn_input

decision_logic_in_execute_tools_and_side: 1. Execute all tools (function, computer, shell, MCP, etc.)
2. IF interruptions (pending tool approvals) → return NextStepInterruption immediately
4. IF handoffs detected in processed_response → execute_handoffs → return NextStepHandoff
- dict with 'stop_at_tool_names' → is_final_output=True if matching tool name
- callable → invokes custom function with (context_wrapper, tool_results)
6. IF tool final output → execute_final_output → return NextStepFinalOutput
7. IF no tools/approvals to run AND message output exists:
- IF structured output_schema → validate_json then execute_final_output
- IF plain text → execute_final_output with text
key_relationships: execute_tools_and_side_effects owns the branching logic for final/handoff/continue/interrupt
execute_final_output is a thin wrapper delegating to execute_final_output_step
execute_final_output_step calls run_final_output_hooks then builds SingleStepResult
run_final_output_hooks fires both RunHooks.on_agent_end and AgentHooks.on_end concurrently
_finalize_streamed_final_output in RunLoop handles post-SingleStepResult streaming teardown
run_final_output_hooks_fn parameter allows test injection / override of hook logic
_maybe_finalize_from_tool_results is an internal gate between tool execution and finalization
important_notes: execute_final_output is a convenience alias for execute_final_output_step with same signature
run_final_output_hooks_fn optional parameter enables test injection into execute_final_output_step
output_guardrail_results in SingleStepResult is always [] from execute_final_output_step; guardrails run later in _finalize_streamed_final_output
In streaming mode, run_final_output_hooks is also called directly in run_loop.py at max_turns error handler path
tool_use_behavior can be: 'run_llm_again' (default), 'stop_on_first_tool', dict with 'stop_at_tool_names', or custom async/sync callable
AgentOutputSchemaBase.validate_json is called for structured (non-plain-text) output types
QueueCompleteSentinel signals stream consumers the run is fully done
session persistence happens in _finalize_streamed_final_output via save_items callback
